name: Steamed Fish Package (Tashmul De Pescado)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Freshwater fish - Perch, bass, trout diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the diced fish, tomato, onion, black pepper, salt, thyme and bay leaves together.
2. Place the mixture in the middle of the leaves or foil. Fold over each half to the center.
3. Fold over each end toward the middle.
4. Steam the packages in a Chinese-style steamer over hot water at moderate heat for 30 minutes.
5. Unwrap and serve hot in the wrappers.
Variation: This procedure works well if you substitute a 1-pound fillet of ocean fish such as scrod, sea bass, mackerel, or any other personal preference.
